title: NYC Law Department — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Law Department (Office of the Corporation Counsel) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the seven Law Department Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us, agency label 'Law Department (LAW)') and nyc.gov/site/law. The Law Department is an agency-facing legal office, so the NYC geography spine is largely vestigial here — only the civil-litigation index carries a property key (Lead BBL) — but it is kept for consistency with the rest of the NYC Modernization project.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

LegalDivisionRef.description: A reference to a Law Department legal division / practice area ('LD Division' / 'Division Name').

Money.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (money.json#/$defs/MoneyUSD); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Money still resolve.
